list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Update brand name and enhance localization in UI components
Updated company branding in i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency across languages. Improved Home and Header components with better design, text formatting, and dynamic styling. Also added favicon metadata and refined animation code for improved readability.

task.summary:
Add theme, i18n contexts, and header component
Replaced default app structure with contexts for theming and internationalization (i18n). Introduced "Header" component with language and theme toggles. Updated styles, removed unused files, and added supporting libraries in `package-lock.json`.

Add footer component and update i18n content
Introduced a new footer component and integrated it into the layout. Updated i18n files (en and pt) with footer translations and new warnings for ongoing site renovations. Enhanced the home page with additional contact information and styling tweaks. Added Qodana configuration for static code analysis.

Update README with project details and contribution info
Replaced the generic Next.js boilerplate content with specific details about the Nidus Soluções project. Included information about the repository, contribution policy, and contact instructions. This improves clarity and aligns the README with the project's purpose.

Add Google Analytics integration to layout
Integrated Google Analytics into the app's layout component using the `GoogleAnalytics` component from `@next/third-parties`. This enables tracking of user interactions and enhances insights into app usage.

Add About Us and Services sections with animations
Introduces new "About Us" and "Services" sections to the project, featuring team member profiles, company details, and service descriptions with interactive animations. Includes layout improvements, smooth scroll behavior, and updated localization for EN and PT languages.

Add About Us and Services sections with animations
Introduces new "About Us" and "Services" sections to the project, featuring team member profiles, company details, and service descriptions with interactive animations. Includes layout improvements, smooth scroll behavior, and updated localization for EN and PT languages.

Update workspace.xml to use XML-escaped characters
Replaced raw characters with XML-escaped equivalents in .idea/workspace.xml. This ensures proper handling of special characters and maintains IDE configuration integrity.

Add responsive improvements and enhance language/menu handling
Improved responsive styling across multiple sections by introducing breakpoints for paddings, margins, and font sizes. Enhanced header functionality with outside click handling for menus, ensuring better user experience. Updated localization and corrected texts to maintain consistency across languages.

Add responsive improvements and enhance language/menu handling
Improved responsive styling across multiple sections by introducing breakpoints for paddings, margins, and font sizes. Enhanced header functionality with outside click handling for menus, ensuring better user experience. Updated localization and corrected texts to maintain consistency across languages.

Add ContactSection with form and animations
Introduced a new ContactSection component featuring a form with animations to collect user inquiries. Integrated localization for both English and Portuguese, and added dependencies for form handling. Updated the app structure to include the new section and ensured responsive design compatibility.

Update brand name and improve localization in header and home sectionsUpdate branding in i18n and improve Home/Header components
Updated company branding in English and Portuguese i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency. Enhanced the Home and Header components with better design and text formatting for dynamic styling. Added favicon metadata and improved transition/animation code formatting for readability.

Update brand name and enhance localization in UI components
Updated company branding in i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency across languages. Improved Home and Header components with better design, text formatting, and dynamic styling. Also added favicon metadata and refined animation code for improved readability.

MESSAGE.value:
Add theme, i18n contexts, and header component
Replaced default app structure with contexts for theming and internationalization (i18n). Introduced "Header" component with language and theme toggles. Updated styles, removed unused files, and added supporting libraries in `package-lock.json`.

Add footer component and update i18n content
Introduced a new footer component and integrated it into the layout. Updated i18n files (en and pt) with footer translations and new warnings for ongoing site renovations. Enhanced the home page with additional contact information and styling tweaks. Added Qodana configuration for static code analysis.

Update README with project details and contribution info
Replaced the generic Next.js boilerplate content with specific details about the Nidus Soluções project. Included information about the repository, contribution policy, and contact instructions. This improves clarity and aligns the README with the project's purpose.

Add Google Analytics integration to layout
Integrated Google Analytics into the app's layout component using the `GoogleAnalytics` component from `@next/third-parties`. This enables tracking of user interactions and enhances insights into app usage.

Add About Us and Services sections with animations
Introduces new "About Us" and "Services" sections to the project, featuring team member profiles, company details, and service descriptions with interactive animations. Includes layout improvements, smooth scroll behavior, and updated localization for EN and PT languages.

Update workspace.xml to use XML-escaped characters
Replaced raw characters with XML-escaped equivalents in .idea/workspace.xml. This ensures proper handling of special characters and maintains IDE configuration integrity.

Add responsive improvements and enhance language/menu handling
Improved responsive styling across multiple sections by introducing breakpoints for paddings, margins, and font sizes. Enhanced header functionality with outside click handling for menus, ensuring better user experience. Updated localization and corrected texts to maintain consistency across languages.

Remove unused useEffect import from Section.tsx
The useEffect hook was imported but not used in the component, leading to unnecessary clutter. This change improves code clarity and eliminates an unused dependency.

Add responsive improvements and enhance menu/language handling
Improved responsive styling with updated breakpoints for paddings, margins, and font sizes. Enhanced header functionality by implementing outside click handling for menus. Adjusted localization and corrected text inconsistencies for better multilanguage support.

Add ContactSection with form and animations
Introduced a new ContactSection component featuring a form with animations to collect user inquiries. Integrated localization for both English and Portuguese, and added dependencies for form handling. Updated the app structure to include the new section and ensured responsive design compatibility.

Update brand name and improve localization in header and home sectionsUpdate branding in i18n and improve Home/Header components
Updated company branding in English and Portuguese i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency. Enhanced the Home and Header components with better design and text formatting for dynamic styling. Added favicon metadata and improved transition/animation code formatting for readability.

Update brand name and enhance localization in UI components
Updated company branding in i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency across languages. Improved Home and Header components with better design, text formatting, and dynamic styling. Also added favicon metadata and refined animation code for improved readability.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Update brand name and enhance localization in UI components
Updated company branding in i18n files to "Nidus Digital Solutions" for consistency across languages. Improved Home and Header components with better design, text formatting, and dynamic styling. Also added favicon metadata and refined animation code for improved readability.
